_note: Mandi correspondent stub entries for the Bagaan Sathi JH expansion. Each entry is a placeholder until real correspondents are recruited on the ground — keep active=false in production. The detector and aggregation pipelines read this file lazily; missing entries fall back to the default synthetic provider in pipelines/flash_alert_detector.py.

correspondents.name: Bhagalpur correspondent (placeholder)
correspondents.notes: Bhagalpur is the Jardalu GI mandi anchor. Recruit a Hindi-speaking correspondent before launch.

correspondents.name: Malda correspondent (placeholder)
correspondents.notes: Malda is the Himsagar mandi for West Bengal-side JH supply. Hindi-speaking correspondent acceptable; Bengali preferred long-term.

correspondents.name: Delhi Azadpur correspondent (placeholder)
correspondents.notes: Azadpur is the national price-signal anchor for mango. Sets the export / urban-trader reference price; English correspondent OK because the daily report mixes Hindi+English.
